reviews.review_text: Very natural and well maintained. Quiet night. 20mins walking to the city center and main beaches.

The campsite is good, you can go to the city center and to the marina without car, the sanitary facilities are clean (even if the showers for women tend to be cold). However, unpowered sites are not all equal, some sites are between trees and this is often narrow.
Vriendelijke ontvangst met goede uitleg over omgeving.

November 2025 - powered site
Stayed on 2 occasions on the way to cooktown and then again on our back through. The park is lovely, quite and very clean. Ash and Jack were amazing on both occasions, and i would highly recommend anyone to stay and i will definitely stay again ❤️
Thank you both for a friendly and outgoing friendship

We stayed in powered sites for 2 nights last week. The amenities were spotless, an amazing shower, probably the best of our whole trip. Gardens well maintained & staff lovely & helpful. Special shout out to Ash who helped my brother & I with some paperwork. Went above & beyond to help us which was much appreciated. Cheers, Tania & Brad

Park was centrally located, neat and tidy park and so were the amenities. Staff friendly and helpful when checking in.  Only stayed one night due to the smell which was absolutely terrible.  Couldn’t sleep because of smell.   Cut stay short.   Next morning found out that sewerage treatment plant is located behind the park.
Great stay. Very quiet contrary to expectations. A few backpackers but you don’t notice that they’re there. Very close to town and the beach. Staff super friendly and very helpful. 👍🏼

After staying for seven weeks at the pandanus caravan park We would like to thank Ash and Jack and the team for making us feel very welcome all staff are very friendly the park and facilities are kept immaculate Murray and Kate

Just a short walk from the main shopping centre in Port Douglas making it a good location. If you don't want to walk then there are frequent local shared buses that are available. The caravan sites are generally large and easy to get into.
Sam was very helpful and friendly for both booking and checking in.
We would stay here again, next time we are in Port Douglas

Stellplätze: sind völlig in Ordnung. 4/5

Toiletten/Waschraum: Toiletten und Waschbecken waren nicht Sauber voller Haare

Duschen: Duschen waren auch nicht sauber und funktionieren nicht richtig die Temperatur war nicht einstellbar.
Netter, ruhiger Platz, wenn man nicht an der Straßenseite steht

If you have kids do not stay here!

We stayed here with family for a week and our kids got told off because apparently they were being too loud in the pool. The manager rudely approached us and advised that there had been a complaint and he could hear our kids from the office. Our kids were just having fun! Even a couple a seat away thought he was very rude and the complaint was unfounded.

As we were leaving the pool the old couple who complained tried to pick a physical fight with us from the verandah of their cabin and the old lady gave us the rude finger (very mature behaviour from those baby boomers especially with small children around).

Maybe advertise the park for over 60s!

Apparently the park is going to be demolished next year and units built so these reviews are probably pointless but I’m also looking forward to the unprofessional way in which pandanus staff respond to this review as evident in their other responses to 1 star reviews and their face to face conduct!

Finally - just don’t stay here with kids!

Stayed there with some friends and we all thought it was a hidden gem close to the town in Port Douglas . The staff were very friendly and made sure we had a comfortable stay . The cabin was spotlessly clean and the grounds are well maintained . Will definitely stay there again and will recommend to others
Fantastic park close to the beach and easy walk into town. Staff are so helpful and friendly and the amenities are very clean. Highly recommend.
Far to expensive for a poor quality caravan park, it let's down the name of Port Douglas  not worth any more then $30.00 per night. We paid $80.00 per night. Worst park in 15years of travelling.

You don’t have many options if you caravan at Port Douglas. Pandanus or Tropic Breeze.

Pandanus is in need of a major upgrade as the facilities are run down outside the small kitchen in a corner of the park.

It was noisy on two sides from the road and from the next door back packers.

The manager I think his name is Ash is very helpful and his team did their best to keep the park clean and tidy.

There is no view, no activities and an old pool.

$70 a night is about $20 too much for what is provided.

Sadly like too much at Port Douglas, no value for money.

I stayed in one of the units at Pandanus Caravan Park for a couple of months, and it’s the best caravan park I’ve come across during my travels around Australia. The park is immaculately maintained - the grounds and facilities are beautiful, peaceful, and clearly looked after with care.
The pool, barbecue, and kitchen areas are always clean and genuinely enjoyable to spend time in.

The managers are fantastic - friendly, approachable, and always willing to help. They really go above and beyond, and it’s clear they love what they do. All of the staff are great :)

I've been on the road now 6 months and over 50 parks and the crew out here are absolutely amazing people.  They have a great energy and  go above and beyond to make you feel welcomed and at home .
Nothing but genuine smiles love and respect.  Makes staying here one of my favourite stops. We all know its about the energy these days and these guys and gal's have the best 👌 💯🫶
The park has great facilities and close to town also.
Thanks for everything . I Will always be dropping in whenever im in Port Douglas   .

Recht laut bis spät in den Abend obwohl die Camp Kitchen ab 22.00 Uhr geschlossen ist. Trotzdem saßen um 22.45 noch große Gruppen an jungen Leuten / Long term work and travel Gruppen lautstark zusammen. Eher eine Notlösung der Platz, auch die Plätze waren sehr uneben

Je ne recommande pas, nous y avons séjourné une nuit avec mon copain et heureusement que nous n’avions pas réservé une nuit de plus. L’emplacement était minuscule, absolument pas droit, sale et sans aucun entretien. Sans parler de l’odeur infecte qu’on a du supporter toute la soirée, sûrement dû à une remonter d’égouts ou autre. Heureusement que les toilettes et douches était a peu prêt propre.
Nous voyageons depuis Sydney et n’avons jamais vue ça nous ne demandons pas le luxe mais avoir un terrains plat est le minimum pour un camping.

It’s a large park not too far from Macrossan Street, Port Douglas’s main drag with all the shops and restaurants. Marina and beach close by too.|Plenty of powered and un-powered sites, some cabins, a pool, camp kitchen and lots of trees.|Amenities looking very tired, old fashioned with peeling paint. Desperately need an upgrade.|Laundry has old washing machines and clothes dryers with some not working.|However, the new managers and two great long serving staff plus other staff are doing their best to cope with a sinking ship. Apparently, the park is going to be re-developed as a resort but no one seems to know when. Hence no funds for needed repairs and renovations.|Very sad, as it has been a great park over the years, always popular but didn’t seem so popular when we were there.|Come on park owners, spend a few bucks so campers can have a good experience.

Loved the two days I stayed here on a lovely grassy unpowered site. Would like to have stayed longer.  It’s a lovely quiet park,  the facilities are very clean with a great camp kitchen. Ash was very accommodating and friendly, In fact all of the management staff here were very pleasant. It’s location is convenient in that it’s about a 20minute leisurely stroll to the Marina & Main Street area.

We stayed here for just one night. The lady who checked us in wasn't overly friendly and the bathrooms were very outdated. My shower couldn't decide if it wanted to be hot or cold. Way too expensive for what it was. Better options in the area in our opinion.
The toilet and shower cubicles are very tiny.the overall dimensions of the amenities block is fine it's the cubicles that are small everyone I spoke to said the same thing

Nous n’avons pas vraiment apprécié notre séjour ici : pleins de déjections de chauve-souris qui nichent dans les arbres ici sur la tente et la voiture en quelques heures, la musique de l’auberge de jeunesse attenante qui peut durer jusqu’à 23h30 certains soirs. Le deuxième soir de notre séjour, nous sommes rentrés au camping à 18h et un manager nous a demandé pour quelle raison on était rentrés dans le camping sans s’arrêter au bureau (fermé à cette heure là en plus), nous avons donc montré notre reçu pour les deux nuits. Pourquoi ne pas contrôler le numéro de la voiture que l’on donne pourtant pendant le check-in pour s’assurer que ce sont bien des clients autorisés qui rentrent dans l’établissement ? C’est la première fois qu’on a eu ça en deux mois de voyage sur la côte Est Australienne. Forcément l’expérience est mitigée !
Great stop point ,helpful owner

Nous sommes restés 3 nuits dans ce camping avec notre van aménagé et le prix est vraiment raisonnable par rapport à la concurrence ! De plus, l’accueil a été irréprochable, avec beaucoup d’aide et de conseils de la part du gérant. Je ne peux que recommander d’y séjourner !
Bien placé, pas trop loin du centre-ville et très calme. La piscine est un vrai + !

Absolutely love this place, my partner and I stayed during the wet season for a couple of nights on our road trip. Really quiet, almost the park to ourselves, bar what seems like some permanent residents.

We parked out campervan in Plot 68, just behind the kitchen overlooking rainforest.

Kitchen has everything you need. Toilets, showers and laundry all great. The pool is absolutely lush to cool off in!

Ash was incredibly kind and helpful, giving us great recommendations. The highlight for us, was meeting Winnie, the adorable dog!

My boyfriend and I stayed here and absolutely loved it! The showers, toilets, pool, camp kitchen and grounds were always so clean and tidy. We were worried about the road being a bit close but during our stay had completely forgotten about the road, you can’t hear a thing! The owners Jack and Ash made us feel so welcome the moment we arrived and made us feel like we could go to them with any concerns that we may have. It’s only a 15 / 10 minute walk to the Main Street of Port Douglas. We looked at the caravan park up the road and it’s SO cramped, the spaces at this park were much more spread out and had beautiful trees and flowers around the place. We will definitely be back. Could not fault this caravan park!

I had an amazing stay at Pandanus Caravan Park! The place is beautiful, well-kept, and super relaxing. Ash was awesome – as a solo traveler, I felt so safe and comfortable thanks to his friendliness and helpfulness. The management is lovely and genuinely cares about guests. Highly recommend this place if you’re in Port Douglas – I’ll definitely be back!

Hi Ash, just wanting to tell you that our stay at your park was pleasurable. The amenaties are clean and spotless, and the location was great. If we are ever back up your way, we will definately stay there again... Thumbs up to you.
Damo & Jodie :-)

Was grateful these guys gave me a unit to myself and accommodated me with physical disabilities, such a nice place with clean facilities, beautiful pool area and a happy vibe all round.|The owners are super friendly and have a wide array of knowledge when it comes to travelling around Oz, was pretty cool to be able to connect with people that have experienced so much in this profession.|Thanks guys, hope this venture will blossom into something big, keep up the good work

Wir waren super zufrieden, haben sogar noch zwei Tage dran gehängt. Alles wird sehr ordentlich geführt, Waschräume und die sehr großzügige Küche immer top gepflegt. Es war gerade nicht viel los, so dass wir einen tollen Stellplatz für unser Motorhome hatten, den wir uns selbst aussuchen dürften. WLAN hat gut funktioniert.
Darüber hinaus einen großen Dank an Ash, der uns super freundlich empfangen und mit Informationen versorgt hat. Wir können den Campground nur empfehlen.
Everything about this park is great. The amenities, pool, and all the staff are awesome.

Great place, super clean and tidy. The staff were really kind and helpful.
The pool area was perfect.
Thank you very much!!

Pandanus was the perfect spot for us. We were out and about along the east coast with a rented RV and Port Douglas was our final destination. Ash and Jack, managing the caravan park were so generous and hospitable and we enjoyed our stay a lot. The service was impeccable and very personalised. The Park is well-groomed with lots of green space and spotless facilities! Thank you!

Nice camping closing to the center of Port Douglas. An excited and awesome bloke helped us with our late check-in (didn’t ask his name unfortunately), and gave us some tips for around town. Reasonably priced. Nice swimming pool. Clean amenities. If I can find a small remark however, it would be good if you can provide some basic cookware/cutlery in or around the kitchen. Not everyone has that available. 5/5 nonetheless

Ash was so welcoming right from our phone call before arrival. He has been amazing & the facilities are lovely & clean, Pool is awesome, sites are great. We had a wasp nest above our site & Ash came & removed it very promptly & even got a few stings, sorry mate, but great work. We’ve stayed 3 nights & travelled out each day. So close to town & very convenient for all. Would certainly come stay again & highly recommend it 😎 top stuff Ash!
Sehr schöner Caravan Park. Personal sehr nett. Die Sanitären Anlagen sehr sauber. Küche und Grillstation auch sauber und alles vorhanden. Sehr zu Empfehlen.

I have stayed on this campsite for two months and Helen and Scott have made me feel so at home here. I’ll be forever grateful that the staff on the campsite created a home far away from home for me. They’re working hard everyday to keep the campsite clean for everyone. Clean camp kitchen, showers, campsites etc!
The last couple of weeks I had a blast with Ash and Jackson who are the new managers and keep continuing to make the guests feel as comfortable as ever. Thanks for the fun game nights guys and I’ll see you when I get back 🫶🏼🦋

Well maintained camper park. Accommodating and carying management that was flexible to meet our needs.
Facilities are clean, and prices are fair.  Very much enjoyed our stay.

Very accommodating host. Super friendly and very Knowledgable on the area. With tour suggestions ect.
Clean park and clean amenities

I loved staying at Pandanus and this was a lot to do with the kind and helpful service provided by Scott and Helen. We have stayed in a lot of caravan parks in Australia and this park is by far the friendliest. I highly recommend Pandanus. The sites are spacious, shady and well maintained.

So in my 30 years of camping, I don't think I have ever come across a pair of managers nicer and more willing to help the Jake and Ash. They alone made our stay here wonderful. The park also helped being clean and full of all the amenities you could ever need. Thankyou Ash and Jake.

Cheapest and lowest rated caravan park in Port Douglas for a reason, just read the reviews to find out. Helen is just a grumpy and annoying person but Scott is genuinely so aggressive and more often than not intoxicated looking that you actually don’t feel safe in a place you’re paying to stay. When speaking to the other guests it seems to be a common feeling. Just a matter of time before something bad happens here - stay away from them for your own safety. Definitely stay in the other car parks.

The place is well located but is a sardines can.
The worst about Pandanus is customer service. The elder lady and man at the reception were extremely rude. They  did our camping experience one of the worst of our trip.
Unfortunately since this Caravan Park has great location, people will still go and these receptionists can be as rude as they want and still get guests.

Ash was really friendly and helpful on the phone and took time to show us around when we arrived and have a chat, really great service. Park is well kept and quiet, lots of trees and shade around our spot which is a good size and level.
Good camping, nice facilities large and spacious setup. Good amenities, working pool and not too expensive (ASD 67 powered site). Friendly and helpful staff.

We stayed one night with our small campervan, and it was really bad night for us. We got the place just next to the toilets with absolutely no privacy. It was too much lights during the night and noisy. There weren’t any amenities in the kitchen and was a little bit dirty. The worst campsite we stayed in Australia, it is not worth the money we paid $46!

We are 2 backpackers who spent many weeks in the Pandanus Caravan Park. We were a bit unsure wether we would like the park but gave it a try, and we were not disappointed! Helen and Scott are doing an amazing job at keeping the place spotless and making the guests feel at home. The camp kitchen has everything you need and is kept clean every day. The amenities are deep cleaned every day, which we highly appreciated. Because this is a smaller park, the managers know their customers and walk around the park regularly. We felt almost as part of a family and not just a number.
We definitely recommend staying at Pandanus and will be coming back ☺️
Nice park , good pool, camp kitchen,  toilet block probably due for upgrade but had a good stay

Pandanus was our home for 2 months and we couldn’t be happier with it. We’ve been very welcome here since day one and Helen, Scott, Roisin and John made us feel at home so far away from home! The park is beautiful, the facilities are great and very clean. It’s a very quiet place with a great sense of community, where you can enjoy the peace of beautiful Port Douglas. We’ve loved every moment of our stay here and can’t wait to come back. A big thank you to all of the Pandanus team, we’re gonna miss you!

Spent two months here and definitely couldn’t have asked for a better place. Amazing and helpful staff from day one, a big shoutout to Helen, Scott, John and Roisin. Great facilities and beautiful park. If looking for the best holiday park in port Douglas you don’t need to look any further, Pandanus really puts guest experience and comfort as a priority, and it shows on the daily basis.

Very bad experience. The truth is that we read the reviews, and they weren’t good, but we decided to give it a chance because the prices were more competitive. However, there’s an explanation for why the prices are lower than anywhere else.

The lady at the reception and her husband are rude; they don’t treat their customers well, especially their foreign customers. I could say they are racist. They kicked us out after three days of staying there with the excuse that they have a clause allowing them to kick anyone out at any time.

As advice, it’s better to pay $20 more and go to a place where they treat you like anyone else and make you feel at home.

Of the year I have been in Australia, I have never had such a bad experience as here. It is the first time (and I hope the last) that I feel discriminated against for being a backpacker. From day 1, the receptionist, Helen, treated us as if we couldn't pay for anything else and that we basically had to settle for what they gave us without being able to choose a place that suited us (among those that were available). She treated me as disrespectful. and a liar when I thought we had done something and in truth we had not. She creates stories in her head and doesn't come out of them. If you go out late or see people outside, she questions you as if you were doing something wrong, both inside and outside the campsite. Really unpleasant

Great location very obliging managers leading helpful staff making our stay  relaxing and enjoyable each and every year.
Rustic setting!

We had a really bad experience at this place. We got there asking for a site. They offered us the last site and told us to check if our car fit there. We did it and came back to pay but they booked the site for another one BY PHONE at that moment. They were very rude and even when they made a mistake, they treat us like we were doing something wrong. Horrible costumer service ever.
Very tight caravan spots, very good location.

We had the most relaxing 5 week holiday possible. The cabins tidy & spotlessly clean.Staff excellent and very polite. (The old lady in office )LOL was so efficient organising our extra week thanks heaps Helen you and Scott made difference between a great and an excellent stay.Will be back next year.

I told front desk that we were 9.5m over all with a 4m trailer with RTT and a ute with a RTT so asked for a bigger sized spot when we got there the spot wasn't big enough for even the trailer went back to front desk and asked if we could be moved and was with a very rude attitude to which they moved us to a different site which we still only just fitted into, other then that toilets and pool were great
Good location. Good facilities. Nice camp kitchen.

Duschen funktionieren nicht richtig und es hat selten warm Wasser.
Wlan funktioniert sehr selten, preis Leistung stimmt überhaupt nicht.

Standort ist nahe am Zentrum.
Anlage ist ansonsten sehr sauber und gepflegt.

We stayed there 2 nights. The camping is nice, the facilities are correct. The main negative aspect is the lady at the reception, as mentioned in many reviews already, who is really rude. Maybe you should think about retire or change job, because it does not give a good image for the camping.

It’s been the worst experience we’ve ever had during our stay in Australia. They’ve been ruude and r - cist since the very first moment we checked in. The blonde lady has been nothing but rude, making r - cist comments against “South America” and treating us like the worst when we did nothing but being respectful with them, the amenities and the other customers. Backpackers please don’t stay here!! We’re not welcome in this terrible place :(
Really bad woman at the reception who is doing a generality about all the backpackers ! Run away !
awesome stay here. ended up extending by extra night twice. Great location, clean, good facilities and friendly staff- what more can you want!
Enjoyed our stay nice and quite  down the back

Stayed on a small site near the ablutions. Unfortunately, it was directly opposite the dump point, which was a popular spot day and night, the smell was overwhelming  😩 The ablutions were quite messy throughout our stay. The location was good.

Well what a beautiful 3 weeks with have had here. A beautiful maintained caravan park with excellent old fashioned friendliness and hospitality from management Scott and Helen. Thanks you very much and see you next year

Standard park, good amenities,  sites are reasonable in size. Like a lot of parks it is getting pricey and is starting to show as there are a few empty sites in peak season
Is convenient to port douglas tourist strip

Me he alojado 2 noches en este sitio y me han picado todos los bichos del mundo, chinches y pulgas, tengo las piernas llenas de picaduras y mis compañeros igual. Me alojé en una cabaña de madera (se supone que las limpian y pagas un plus por ello), hemos pagado un plus hasta porque viniera 1 amiga que vive en port Douglas a recogernos (una visitante que entró 1 minuto a recogernos) y si los dueños nos hicieron pagar, porque no avisamos de que iba a recogernos (no entendimos nada), me parecieron muy antipáticos y bordes los encargados del camping y no volvería a ir, por el trato y por los bichos que nos han picado por el cuerpo. La piscina muy agradable.

Estuve en este camping hace dos meses y salí muy decepcionada. Al hablar en mi idioma nativo ( español) realizaron gestos condescendientes y groseros hacia mi persona. Una pareja de gente mayor RACISTA. Si el sitio ya era malo la atención mucho peor. Si soy españoles o latinos recomiendo 0 hospedaros aqui

Helen and Scott and the team were fabulous.
An unexpected extension to our stay was handled with professionalism and genuine kindness.  Helen and Scott operate in a warm and friendly manner and care very much about the guest experience for everyone.  So thankful we were able to stay as long as we did and feel like a valued guest every day of our stay.
Had 2 nights here, wish we had time for more. Its a lovely camp with great facilities and managers. You can walk to the yacht jetties and into Port Douglas from here too.

Fabolous place. Stayed in unpowered campsite backed right against forest, under trees. Great clean amenities and very friendly service.
Highly recommended.

My wife & I & many other riders & friends are a part of a large number of motor cycle riders coming together from all over Australia, for a charitable cause. The managers of the park made us feel very welcome & couldn't do enough to meet our needs. They were genuinely very pleasant & nothing was too much trouble. Genuinely lovely people. Other than that, the park itself was clean & tidy  & a top spot to stay. Quiet & extremely relaxing. Also, the ammenities were up to date & very clean. We would definitely stay here again & highly recommend same to others.

We stayed here for two nights. After we didn't sleep so well the first night, the owners offered us a change of campsite. Very attentive and friendly. The campground is very well maintained and a short walk takes you directly to the large palm beach. We had a pleasant stay and can recommend the campground.

kitchen, toilets, showers - everything is fine and clean.
They got a fantastic pool area & friendly staff. Nothing to complain about.

Partner and I are travelling around Aus and stopped here for over a month. Would highly recommend the stay, the park is walking distance from the town, the park itself is neat and welcoming and Scott and Helen go above and beyond for their guests. Favourite part was pizza nights on Sundays giving an opportunity to mingle with the other guests in the park and eat delicious food!

We had the best time staying here- we'd originally booked one night but ended up extending to 4 as we had such a great time. Helen and the team are so friendly and welcoming and the site amenities are spotlessly clean. Everything you could need is in walking distance with Port Douglas on your doorstep. (10-15 mins walk)

I'd recommend anyone visiting Cairns to get out of the city and spend their time in Port Douglas instead, its such a lovely town with a friendly, welcoming atmosphere and just visiting for one day can't do it justice. 3 days to explore the Barrier Reef, Daintree and surrounding areas was spot on.

Would give this place 10 stars if I could, best we've stayed in two months of Australia...

We have been travelling in our caravan as a family for two months now and this is the first caravan park that we have stayed in that we actually never wanted to leave. We had booked for 4 nights originally and stayed nearly two weeks. The management were really friendly and did a great job of
Maintaining the grounds. The pool
Was great to cool off in. and is only a short walk not even 10minutes into town or to the beach  definitely will be back again.

We stayed for 4 nights with 2 camper trailers.
The team were extremely accommodating and friendly, going out of their way to make sure we had a good stay.
They gave great advice on trips to the GBR and Daintree.
The facilities were great, clean and tidy- including the bathrooms and the BBQ area.
They have a great pool and we had a blast at the pizza night on Sunday- which was a great way to meet new people.
Thanks a lot for having us!

Hele mooie camperplek op een super locatie.
Mooi zwembad en het personeel is super vriendelijk!
friendliest staff, clean showers and toilets, big kitchen with everything you need, good wifi, they help you with everything there

Excellent place to stay - Scott and other staff members were really friendly and made the effort to remember people's names and look after their guests.

They had great recommendations for nearby attractions and deals on 3 night stays and week long stays (with flexibility on these also)

Great place to stay in an amazing location! Would recommend

Ce camping est génial ! Il y a tout ce dont vous avez besoin à disposition pour passer une bonne nuit :) les hôtes sont incroyablement gentils, ils vous donneront les meilleurs conseils pour visiter Port Douglas.

Ultra clean facilities, great location. nice clean and cool pool, the grounds are well kept. the  Managers are so friendly, so welcoming and so helpful!
Can't fault this place.

We had a very enjoyable stay here, amenities were very clean and functional, the site is in a very good location and the couple who run the site are incredibly kind and welcoming, and made us feel very welcome as the only english visitors at the Australia Day barbecue at which we had a great time. Overall, if you are thinking whether to stop of in Cairns or Port Douglas to see the reef then I’d definitely recommend Port Douglas, as a backpacker who has done both, and Panadus is a fantastic place to stay while you are there!

Le camping est très bien entretenu, situé proche du centre ville de Port Douglas avec une piscine. Les propriétaires sont très accueillants et attentionnés. Ils nous ont invité à un barbecue pour fêter le 26 janvier que nous avons partagé avec d autres campeurs Australiens. Nous sommes restées 2 nuits et en repartant le propriétaire nous a offert des muffins ! Nous recommandons vivement ce camping et surtout le chaleureux accueil que nous avons eu ! N' hésitez pas à vous y arrêter !!!!

Helen and Scott were extremely accommodating. We had car issues and Scott was extremely helpful and attentive and was able to put us in touch with the right people. The facilities were excellent and everything was very clean, wifi was included which was great. Thank you very much!
My stay at the park was awesome. The managers were super friendly and helpful. I would definitely recommend staying, I will absolutely stay there again.
We really enjoyed our stay, thank you Helen and Scott for being so kind and helpful :)
Beautiful park, good amneties, clean and well maintained. Owners/management are super friendly and goes the extra mile to make sure campers are comfortable.
Fantastic

10 Days interesting we do not change towels or linen for the length of stay not really what we were told VIP cabin Helen very abrupt could have planted a garden on the ceiling fans would not recommend this place

This must be the best park in Australia because it is definitely the   best park we have stayed in.  Helen and Scott are the most wonderful hosts making us very welcome.  We were there prior to and after the cyclone and I was so impressed with their management of the site and their tireless work to ensure everyone was safe.  Our site was spacious and very shady to the point where we didn't need our awning.  The amenities are clean and plentiful and the park is within walking distance of the beach and town.  The pool is a great size and very clean and we had a wonderful stay with the kind and generous Scott and Helen.

Definitely the best camping in queensland ! Helen and Scott are two amazing person, so welcoming and very helpful ! Thank you so much for your help during the cyclone and heavy rain, you were two angels for us this night !! The location is perfect near the marina and all the shops. Amenities are really good hot showers and always very clean ! Large camp kitchen and laundry very clean and tidy.
You have to stay in this camping if you plan to stop in Port Douglas ! Highly recommend.
Very clean and well-maintained campsite, very available, flexible and welcoming managers. We can feel that they do everything possible to ensure that their guests have a pleasant stay.

The nicest caravan park managers you could meet, helped us out with changing a  flat tyre on our campervan, park is well looked after, plenty of room, central to town and best of all is very clean and tidy.

This place a disgrace. Dirty cabin floors were filthy when we arrived and mop left in there disgusting. Sheet covers dirty.
The management revealed at the end of our stay racial and bigot mentality. The reply below addressing a previous comment only shows how far they will go to support their ignorant perceptions. Claiming to know the truth of another situation and painting themselves as the willing helpers of the poor minority. " you people" well us people actually didn't get asked to leave another place nice flip on the story AGAIN to feed your prejudices no facts proper context. The mother did not leave her child alone she was with us just sitting near by watching a cartoon.
Don't waste your money!

Omgiven av vacker tropisk regnskog ligger denna fantastiska camping. Det är lugnt och fridfullt och det enda som hörs är fågelkvitter! Verkligen ett toppenställe att stanna på i port Douglas ! Fin och fräsch poolavdelning . Duschar o toaletter samt utekök fungerade också perfekt. Det är lagom gångavstånd , ca 10 min till restauranger !
Port Douglas är väldigt vackert och ett av de bästa ställena vi stannat på under vår resa på östkusten .
Pehr och Hanna

We stayed here for 1 night, and just randomly picked this camping. Best camping in Australia till this far. Very good facilities, clean amnities and a well equiped & clean kitchen. The man and wife running the camping are so nice and helpful. 5/5 for sure!

A big thanks to Scott and Helen who not only keep an excellent facilitated, clean and tidy park but to going above and beyond with offers of help and kindness when I arrived with a broken wing 🦅.

This gorgeous park is right in the heart of Port, close to everything and the caring attitude and nature of management for their park and it’s occupants was the icing on my holiday cake. 5 star experiences like this bring you back again and again 🏝.

Great handy location to the centre of Port Douglas, Marina and beaches. Staff were very friendly and welcoming. Sites and amenities were regularly cleaned and tidied. Dated but clean. Large camp kitchen, laundry and plenty of washing hoists again, dated but clean and tidy. Pool good size with plenty of sun loungers and some shade. Would benefit from a kids play area and a kids Dvd/book/games library.
Super endroit tenu par de chouettes personnes !!! Merci beaucoup

Wonderful van park conveniently located  a 15 minute walk from town centre or marina. Managers Helen and Scott are friendly and helpful. Nicely looked after park and amenities always clean. Highly recommend.

We stayed here for 2 nights. Nice park, grounds, and amenities were very clean and tidy. The staff were amazing. So helpful, and nothing was too much trouble. We would most definitely stay there again

Lovely spot with good places to eat nearby.
The staff were so helpful and went beyond to assist us.

Fabulous caravan park, clean and tidy amenities, large shady sites with good size slabs. Helen and Shaun made us very welcome and were extremely helpful with all our enquiries and needs. Short easy walk to beach and town centre. Very reasonable rates, we stayed a week and loved it.

Was soll ich sagen. Einfach sehr sehr netter Service und super nette Leute am Empfang. Der Zugang zum Strand ist super einfach und schnell zu erreichen. Die beiden haben uns am nächsten Tag noch einen Schnorchel Kurs gebucht und haben uns alles erklärt. Ich würde euch auch 6 Sterne geben.
Rudest receptionist I've ever experienced, decided not to make a booking after the way I was spoken to which is a shame because the place looks beautiful. Oh well.

Fantastic spot! Close to everything, great amenities, showers and toilets were nice and tidy, the pool was clean, lots of shade all around the park, and the staff was just incredible. Especially Helen, she’s an actual angel. Helped us book our snorkeling tours and was just on it with good vibes and recommendations. We will come back next time we’re visiting Port Douglas

We stayed here for 2 weeks and loved the location, size of the sites (caravan), pool, garden and the lovely managers. Like all locations in FNQ the bugs can be an issue so make sure you used bug spray. Stunning as usual Port Douglas we love you.

Great spot, close to town. Stayed in a cool shady unpowerd site that was flat and clean. Had all the facilities I needed including a pool to cool off. The management were extremely friendly and even went out of their way to offer me a free lift to an event I was attending. Awesome stay and will be back.

Au top, les gérants sont exceptionnels. Nous sommes arrivés tardivement "hors délais" et nous avons été accueillis avec un grand sourire. La gérante a réservé notre restaurant  et son mari nous y a accompagné. Ce sont des personnes avec des qualités de cœur incroyables.  Espaces spacieux, sanitaires impeccables. Je recommande fortement ce camping.
Amazing place with a short 15 minute walk to town. Lovely managers that were super helpful in giving us the best spot for myself and a mate to set up our swags and bikes. Loved it
One of the warmest welcomes we have had on our trip around Australia. Helen is lovely and full of information. Don’t ask her hubby about the Broncos!! Great park, great location, wonderful managers.

The person working on the campground were super rude to us because a friend of ours dropped a tent of with his car for 10 minutes. He started telling us that he doesn’t want to loose “his temper”

The place is not worth the money.

Tent places with a lot of tree roots so it was really uncomfortable.

Only good thing was the nice lady at the reception.

Very very nice camping! Has  everything you need. Fully equipped and clean kitchen, clean toilets and awesome showers! Pool was also great! 20 min walking from the center and cheaper than other options, very very nice!
Great spot!

Older Caravan Park but conveniently located in Port Douglas. Facilities old but clean.
Grounds have a pleasant tropical feel but heavy usage is showing.

Nice park close walk to town.
Clean facilities and amenities.
Staff are friendly.
We were backed onto the main road, so was a bit noisey, otherwise can recommend this park.

Great park located about 1.5km walk from the end of the shopping strip at Macrossan St and about 400m to the beach.

Clean and very tidy park with loads of mature trees so you may struggle with solar and satellite signal.

We had to park over the slab on our site (44) as the tree has grown making the space too difficult to access with a modern van. But really that wasn’t a big issue.

Staff are friendly and welcoming.

There was a bit of road noise being located on the main access road, but again not a big problem.
Great pressure showers, friendly staff
Not the best Camping I stayed in. Staff is s bit grumpy. They are fully booked. They do not really care. In the night there is a bad smell at the park coming from somewhere. Facilities really basic.

Ita a lovely clean canavan park. Very close to the town of Port Douglas. It's not far from the town you can walk. They have a camper kitchen for people who are camping. Toilets & showers for the campers are kept nice & clean. I stayed in a self-contained unit. It was nice & clean the bed was comfortable. I was close to the reception & pool. People at the reception were very nice. Nice place to stay. I didn't think my accommodation was expensive. Pretty reasonable price.
I love it it's is a nice place  but it's to busy would of loved to stay for a week but can't
